# @agent-os/telemetry-protocol Public API

Status: Telemetry protocol package. Public exports are limited to trace context validation and backend-neutral telemetry event tree vocabulary.

## Public exports

- `.:TRACE_CONTEXT_VERSION`
- `.:TraceContext`
- `.:TraceContextValidation`
- `.:TraceparentSchema`
- `.:TracestateSchema`
- `.:TraceContextSchema`
- `.:validateTraceContext`
- `.:validateOptionalTraceContext`
- `.:copyTraceContext`
- `.:InvalidTraceContext`
- `.:TelemetryEmitKind`
- `.:TelemetryAttributeValue`
- `.:TelemetryEventNode`
- `.:TelemetryEventTree`

## Experimental exports

None.

## Deprecated exports

None.

## Internal-only exports

None.
